attack_surface.modified_endpoint_detail: POST /api/agents/{name}/executions/{id}/result — added 503+Retry-After governor gate AFTER existing auth/ownership/replay/marker checks

non_findings_verified.claim: Malicious agent cannot weaponize the shared-cause pause
non_findings_verified.reason: Detector counts DISTINCT agents (ZSET member=agent_name, ZCARD); one identity contributes at most 1; threshold 20. agent_name is server-side (apply_result param), pinned to the caller's own agent-scoped key via authorize_heartbeat. Recording is CAS-won-gated (no replay double-count). Even 20 compromised identities only delay (never drop) terminals behind an auto-expiring 300s fail-open pause; feature default-OFF.

trend: No prior #1085 report; extends #1083 (cso-2026-06-19-1083-diff.md). No regressions to the #1083 callback hardening — the governor gate is correctly sequenced AFTER auth/ownership/marker. Finding-2 (auth/rate never relabeled cancelled) from cso-2026-06-22 is now mirrored at the backend boundary AND BILLING(429) is wired into the detector.
verdict: CLEAR — no security findings at the 8/10 daily gate. Defensive reliability feature; new attack surface minimal and correctly gated behind authentication; all controls fail-open and default-OFF.
